content.body:
Tests cover: legacy memory loads with safe defaults, new-shape full
round-trip, invalid enum rejection (confidence, classification, promotion_state,
centrality_score out of range), custom compartment dimensions, ApplyDefaults
idempotency, provenance.raw_exhaust_ref placement, new-capture write emission,
and all 24 live .leo/memory/ files in the repository.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: test(kb): add memory schema evolution tests covering legacy compat and new fields
